description: CompositionWhite printed knee-length dress made of woven 100% rayon, has short ruffled sleeves, a round neck, small pleats from the neckline and two pockets on the sidesFitRegularWash careRinse seperatelyGentle hand wash in mild detergentDo not bleachDo not scrub on embroidery and printLine dry inside outIron lowIt’s time to explore and discover new styles and get ready for freshness and summer outdoors with sepia. Stylish, girly and summery, this dress is a must-have in your new season wardrobe.
